typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	lastRefreshDateString as string ()
}

source(output(
		LAST_NAME as string,
		SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_NAME as string,
		SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_NAME as string,
		EMPL_STATUS as string,
		IS_TCOO as integer,
		EMPLID as string,
		FIRST_NAME as string,
		SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_NAME as string,
		SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_NAME as string,
		IS_PLATFORM_APP_SVCS as integer,
		NAME as string,
		SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID as integer,
		SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_ID as integer,
		EMAIL_ID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT to_number(EMPLID) EMPLID     , PREF_FIRST_NAME || \' \' || PREF_LAST_NAME NAME     , PREF_FIRST_NAME FIRST_NAME     , PREF_LAST_NAME LAST_NAME     , EMAIL_ID     				    , CASE 			WHEN (SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID = \'00002115460\' OR SPRVS_ORG_LVL_06_MGR_ID = \'00001672258\') THEN 1 			ELSE 0  			END IS_TCOO         							, CASE 			WHEN (SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_ID = \'00002086646\' OR SPRVS_ORG_LVL_07_MGR_ID = \'00002117751\') THEN 1 			ELSE 0  			END IS_PLATFORM_APP_SVCS     , SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_NAME     , SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_NAME     , CASE      	WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID, \'^[[:digit:]]+$\')     	THEN to_number(SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID)      	ELSE NULL     	END SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID     , SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_NAME     , SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_NAME     , CASE      	WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_ID, \'^[[:digit:]]+$\')     	THEN to_number(SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_ID)      	ELSE NULL     	END SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_ID     , EMPL_STATUS      FROM DISTRIBUTION.VW_CORE_COMMON WHERE WHEN_CHANGED >= TO_DATE(\'\', \'YYYYMMDD\')',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> GetHRCoreCommonUpdates
GetHRCoreCommonUpdates sink(input(
		lastName as string,
		level3Org as string,
		level4Org as string,
		employeeStatus as string,
		isTcoo as integer,
		emplId as integer,
		firstName as string,
		level3Mgr as string,
		level4Mgr as string,
		isPlatformAppServices as integer,
		name as string,
		level3MgrEmplid as integer,
		level4MgrEmplid as integer,
		email as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		lastName = LAST_NAME,
		level3Org = SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_NAME,
		level4Org = SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_NAME,
		employeeStatus = EMPL_STATUS,
		isTcoo = IS_TCOO,
		emplId = EMPLID,
		firstName = FIRST_NAME,
		level3Mgr = SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_NAME,
		level4Mgr = SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_NAME,
		isPlatformAppServices = IS_PLATFORM_APP_SVCS,
		name = NAME,
		level3MgrEmplid = SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID,
		level4MgrEmplid = SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_ID,
		email = EMAIL_ID)) ~> OLEDBDestination
